lacy-cornmeal-pancakes-with-strawberry-c.name: Lacy Cornmeal Pancakes With Strawberry Compote
instructions: Cook strawberries, rum, sugar, salt, and 2 Tbsp. water (add ¼ cup water if not using rum) in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until strawberries are softened and juices have thickened and are syrupy, 20–25 minutes. Let compote cool completely before serving.
Do Ahead: Compote can be made 3 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.
Stir milk and vinegar in a small bowl. Let sit until milk curdles and sours, about 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk cornmeal, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.
Whisk eggs into milk mixture, then add to dry ingredients and whisk vigorously to combine.

Melt 1½ tsp. butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Ladle ⅓ cup batter into skillet. Cook pancake until lacy and browned underneath, about 3 minutes. Flip and cook just until cooked through, about 1 minute. Transfer to a plate (or keep warm on a baking sheet in a 300° oven until ready to serve if desired). Working in 7 more batches, repeat process with remaining butter and batter to make a total of 8 pancakes.
To serve, divide pancakes among plates and spoon compote over.

lamb-cage-on-a-bed-of-spinach-lezzet.name: Lamb Cage On A Bed Of Spinach
instructions: 1. thoroughly blend pyrzola with salt, pepper, mustard, fresh spices and 2 tablespoon sunflower oil.
2. For a day to be marinade, close the above and wait in the refrigerator.
3. Cook the spinach leaves with salty water in a medium-sized pot and pass it from cold water and squeeze the water thoroughly.
4. Take the remaining sunflower oil in the pan.
5. Peel thin chopped onions, garlic, salt, pepper and colorful peppers.
6. Add and blend it well with spinach.
7. Pour pyrzola with sea back in the angry pan.
8. Cook for 15 minutes in the oven with a set of 150 degrees and serve with spinach.

lamb-fricassee-argiro.name: Lamb Fricassee

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg of lamb in ports (chala and hand)
5-6 fresh onions with their leaves chopped
11⁄2 kg of lamb in ports (chala and hand)
5-6 fresh onions with their leaves chopped

instructions: We start by washing the beat well.
Place the Lamb in a pot.
Cover it with cold water and let it simmer until it drinks all its liquids, about 25 minutes.
Then add the olive oil, fresh versions and finely chopped dry onion.
Leave them for 5 minutes to dry well.
Add the potatoes, artichokes, Peas and Carrots.
Fill in some water, barely half the injectors, and simmer for 35-40 minutes.
Check the salt and pepper and sprinkle with the chopped dill.
We make eggmeal and dilute it with some broth from the Frantic.
Pour the food and shake the pot from the handles.
The sauce must be tied up and not so much Juice.
If the meat is bottled and the food has a lot of broth, turn the heat on, remove the lid and bottle hard for 5-6 minutes to resuscitate, reduce the broth, and then make the eggmeal.
Accompany the lamb with the fantastic simple traditional lettuce salad, which fits perfectly.

leek-and-ginger-matzo-balls-in-lemongras.name: Leek And Ginger Matzo Balls In Lemongrass Consommé

ingredients.prep: cut off in strips with vegetable peeler

ingredients.item: - to 7-inch piece large leek (white and pale green parts only)
Chicken fat (reserved from consommé or purchased)

instructions: Place chicken in extra-large pot. Add next 7 ingredients, then enough cold water to cover (about 18 cups). Bring to boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer soup 2 hours, skimming impurities from surface. Let stand 30 minutes. Strain consommé into large saucepan. Boil until reduced to 8 cups, if necessary. Add 1 tablespoon lemon juice; season with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Chill uncovered until cold, then cover and keep chilled (fat will form solid layer on top).
Whisk 4 eggs in medium bowl. Mix in leek, chicken fat, broth, coarse salt, ginger, and pepper. Stir in matzo meal. Cover; chill at least 4 hours.

Using wet hands, shape generous 2 tablespoons matzo mixture into balls. Place on sheet of foil. Bring large pot of salted water to boil over high heat. Drop in matzo balls; cover pot. Reduce heat to low; simmer until matzo balls are cooked through, about 1 hour 10 minutes. Using slotted spoon, transfer matzo balls in single layer to shallow dish. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Rewarm consommé. Add more lemon juice by teaspoonfuls, if desired. Add matzo balls; simmer to reheat, 5 to 10 minutes. Divide matzo balls and consommé among 6 bowls. Garnish with chopped chives.

lemon-blinis-with-caviar-and-scallion-cr.name: Lemon Blinis With Caviar And Scallion Crème Fraîche
instructions: Stir together crème fraîche and 1 tablespoon of the scallions.

Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a large non-stick skillet over low heat and scrap into a small bowl. Whisk in milk, egg, and 1 teaspoon zest. Add flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt and whisk until smooth.
Melt half of remaining butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium-low heat.
Drop 6 rounded teaspoons of batter into skillet and cook until tiny bubbles form on the surface, edges appear dry, and undersides are golden, about 2 to 3 minutes.
Flip and cook until golden and cooked through, about 1 to 2 minutes more. Transfer to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Melt remaining 1/2 tablespoon butter in skillet and make 6 more blinis (you will have a little batter left over).
To serve, top blinis with a small dollop of scallion crème fraîche and some caviar, then sprinkle with remaining lemon zest and scallion.

lemon-buttermilk-pie-with-saffron.name: Lemon Buttermilk Pie With Saffron
instructions: Pulse flour, sugar, and salt in a food processor to combine. Add butter and pulse until mixture resembles coarse meal with a few pea-size pieces of butter remaining.

Transfer to a large bowl and add buttermilk. Mix with a fork, adding more buttermilk by the tablespoon if needed, just until a shaggy dough comes together; knead very lightly until no dry spots remain. Pat into a disk and wrap in plastic. Chill at least 4 hours.
DO AHEAD: Dough can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 325°. Roll out pie dough on a lightly floured surface to a 14” round. Transfer to a 9” pie dish, allowing dough to slump down into dish. Trim dough, leaving about 1” overhang. Fold overhang under and crimp edge. Prick bottom all over with a fork. Freeze 15 minutes.

Line crust with parchment paper or foil, leaving an overhang, and fill with pie weights or dried beans. Place pie dish on a rimmed baking sheet and bake until crust is dry around the edge, 20–25 minutes. Remove parchment and weights; bake until surface looks dry, 10–12 minutes longer.

Meanwhile, blend egg yolks, eggs, buttermilk, sugar, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt, and saffron in a blender until smooth. With motor running, add 2 Tbsp. flour, then butter. Tap blender jar against countertop to burst any air bubbles in filling and pour into warm crust.

Bake pie, rotating halfway through and covering edges with foil if they brown too much before filling is done, until filling is set around edge but center jiggles slightly, 55–65 minutes. Transfer pie dish to a wire rack and let pie cool. Serve pie with whipped cream.
DO AHEAD: Pie can be baked 2 days ahead. Keep at room temperature up to 6 hours; cover and chill to hold longer.

lemon-cake-with-icing-and-poppy-seeds-te.name: Lemon Cake With Icing And Poppy Seeds
lemon-cake-with-icing-and-poppy-seeds-te.original_name: Bolo de limão com glacé e sementes de papoila

ingredients.item: Rasp and juice of 1 large lemon

instructions: Unte uma forma de buraco com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha.
Beat the butter with the sugar, until you get a cute cream, and then incorporate the eggs, slowly and without stopping beating. Add the scraping and lemon juice and poppy seeds and wrap.
Slowly add the flour, previously mixed with the yeast and almond, pour the dough into the form and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 45 minutes.

Prepare the cover: mix the powdered sugar well with lemon juice until you get a thick white cream. Remove the cake from the oven, deform it, cover it with the previous preparation and sprinkle with poppy seeds.

lemon-chiffon-cake-lezzet.name: Lemon Chiffon Cake

ingredients.item: Half water glass ejected u Home
Half water cup less oily cream

instructions: 1. Set oven to 180 degrees.
2. Oil cake mold with 20 cm round clamp.
3. Beat the egg, sugar and grated lemon peel until foam.
4. Mix the flour by adding azar azar.
5. Transfer to cake mold.
6. Cook for 20-25 minutes.
7. Keki leave the grill wire and cool.
8.  Keki enlemesine ikiye kesin.
9. For intermediate filling, take egg yolks, sugar, lemon peel and lemon juice a rough.
10. Cook until it comes to cream consistency.
11. 11. Mix gelatin with less amount of water.
12. Mix the gelatin juice thoroughly until pour boiling water and dissolve.
12. August Add eggs to yellow mixture and cook.
14 July Add and mix the cream.
15. Immediately add the eggs mice when the mixture begins to be lightly solidified and cook.
16. Add a spoon to a mixture of lemony mus and add the rest to the egg wrapped mixture.
17. September Lemon musu broadcast on half cake in the mold.
18. Take the refrigerator to cool and cool on the other cake.
19. September For sos, rub the powder sugar thoroughly with lemon juice.
20. Decorate and serve with chopped lemon peel and Antep nuts on the cake.

lemon-marmalade-argiro.name: Lemon Marmalade

ingredients.item: Sugar (as much as it gets depending on the mixture we measure)
Sugar (as much as it gets depending on the mixture we measure)

instructions: We choose lemons without blows, with intense color and not too soft.
Gently scratch the yellow peel and cut it into thin slices (flesh and whole flesh).
Remove the white membranes and pits (we save them for later).
Cut each slice of lemon into very small pieces.
We collect all the pits and membranes we cleaned from lemons and put them in folded tulle or folded tulle.
Then we tie the tulle.
In a pot with a thick base, add the chopped lemons, the dough with the pits and the membranes.
We cover them with the water.
Boil them over medium heat for 30 minutes after they are boiled until the lemon peels soften.
Remove the pit parcel.
Let it cool and press it to get as much pectin-jellie as we can.
We make sure this pectin falls into the lemons.

We now measure the jam materials with a cup. All the cups that come out of the ingredients we boiled so many cups of sugar we'll add. (About 3.5 cups come out, depending on how much liquid evaporates during boiling.)
Add the ingredients with sugar to boil over medium to high heat, skimming whenever foam appears on the surface.
Boil for about 25-30 minutes until the jam thickens.
The jam is tied when a thick layer is left in the back of the spoon.

lemon-meringue-pie.name: Lemon Meringue Pie

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 2 Tbsp. sugar, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2⅔ cups (333 g) all-purpose flour in a medium bowl. Add 1½ cups (3 sticks) chilled unsalted butter, cut into ½" pieces, and, using your fingers, smash each piece into a thin disk. Take your time doing this and don’t feel compelled to break butter into even smaller pieces. Drizzle ⅔ cup ice-cold water over, dispersing it as widely as possible, and mix with a rubber spatula to bring mixture together into a shaggy mass.

Turn dough out onto a surface and work together with your hands, pushing and flattening until dough holds together when squeezed in your palm but some streaks of dry flour are still visible. Divide dough into 2 portions.

Flatten 1 portion of dough into an 8"-diameter disk. Cut into quarters, stack pieces on top of one another, and flatten dough with a rolling pin to about half of its original height. At this point dough should hold together with no dry spots remaining, and have nice big flakes of butter showing. Use a bench scraper or a large knife to clean any clingy bits of dough from surface. Dust surface with flour, then dust top of dough with flour. Roll out to a ¼"–⅜"-thick round. Wrap dough around rolling pin and transfer to a standard 9"-diameter pie plate. Unfurl into dish, then lift edges and allow dough to slump down into dish. Trim overhang to an even 1" (there will be some excess). Fold overhang under and crimp as desired. Cover and chill until very cold, at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours (cover tightly in plastic wrap if chilling longer than 1 hour). Repeat process with remaining dough and another pie plate. Or form into a 1½"-thick disk, wrap in plastic, and chill up to 3 days (or freeze up to 1 month).

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat oven to 400°. Lay 2 sheets of parchment paper over dough and fill with pie weights or dried beans (they should fill the dish). Set on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet (this will keep any butter drips from smoking up your oven). Bake until edges are lightly golden and bottom is opaque (carefully lift parchment to check; when ready, the crust will not stick to parchment), 30–35 minutes. Remove from oven; reduce oven temperature to 300°. Lift out parchment and weights. Bake crust until evenly deep golden brown all over, 10–15 minutes. If baking both crusts, turn oven dial back up to 400° and let oven preheat; repeat with remaining crust.

Whisk 1 cup (200 g) sugar and ⅓ cup cornstarch in a medium saucepan to combine. Add 2 large eggs and 4 large egg yolks to sugar mixture and whisk vigorously, making sure to get into corners of pan, until mixture is smooth and pale. Whisk in the finely grated zest of 4 lemons, 1 cup fresh lemon juice, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1½ cups water.

Place saucepan over medium heat and bring to a simmer, whisking often and making sure to get into corners of pan, 8–10 minutes (mixture should be bubbling and thickened). Reduce heat and continue to simmer, whisking constantly, 3 minutes. Let cool 5 minutes, whisking every minute.

Add 3 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter to lemon filling and whisk until melted and fully incorporated. Scrape hot filling into baked pie crust; smooth surface. Chill until cold and set, at least 2 hours and up to 3 days.

Combine 4 large egg whites, room temperature, ¾ cup (150 g) sugar, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. cream of tartar in the bowl of a stand mixer or another heatproof large bowl; set over a large saucepan filled with 1" simmering water (bowl shouldn’t touch the water). Heat, stirring constantly, until sugar is dissolved and mixture is warm to the touch, about 4 minutes.

Fit bowl onto mixer fitted with whisk attachment (or use an electric mixer) and beat on medium-high speed until meringue is more than tripled in volume and medium peaks form, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a piping bag fitted with a large round tip (or a resealable plastic bag will work—just snip off a corner after bag is filled). Pipe meringue on top of lemon filling and toast with a kitchen torch or under the broiler.
Do Ahead: Pie (without meringue) can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Editor’s note: This lemon meringue pie recipe was first printed in our November 2019 Thanksgiving issue. Head this way for more of our favorite lemon desserts →

lemon-ricotta-pancakes.name: Lemon-ricotta Pancakes
instructions: Line a fine-mesh strainer with cheesecloth; set over a small bowl. Add ricotta to strainer and let drain for 15 minutes; set aside.
Gently combine berries, 1/3 cup sugar, and lemon juice in a medium bowl. Let macerate, tossing occasionally, until sugar dissolves and juices are released, about 15 minutes.

Whisk both flours, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl. Using an electric mixer, beat egg whites in a medium bowl until frothy. Gradually beat in 2 tablespoons sugar, beating until peaks form. Whisk the egg yolks, remaining 2 tablespoons sugar, and zest in another medium bowl to blend. Whisk in milk. Add the yolk mixture to dry ingredients; whisk just to blend. Add half of the egg white mixture; fold just to blend. Fold in ricotta, then remaining egg white mixture.

Heat a griddle or large heavy nonstick skillet over medium-low heat; brush with melted butter. Using scant 1/2 cup batter for each pancake and working in batches, ladle batter onto griddle and cook until bottom is golden brown, edges are dry, and bubbles form on top of pancake, about 1 1/2 minutes. Flip pancakes and cook until browned and just cooked through, about 1 minute. Transfer pancakes to plates. Serve with berries and their juices.

lemon-chile-white-fish-with-chickpeas.name: Lemon-chile White Fish With Chickpeas

ingredients.item: . aleppo-style pepper or other mild chile flakes

instructions: Pat four 5–6-oz. white fish fillets (such as cod, halibut, or haddock) dry with paper towels and season on both sides with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper. Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook fish until flesh is opaque and barely golden, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a platter.

Heat remaining ⅓ cup extra-virgin olive oil in same pan. Add 2 lemons, thinly sliced, seeds removed, 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, one 15-oz. can chickpeas, rinsed, 1 Tbsp. Aleppo-style pepper or other mild chile flakes, and 1 tsp. smoked paprika and season generously with salt and black pepper. Cook, tossing often, until lemons are softened and jammy and chickpeas are well coated, 5–7 minutes.

Add 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter and 1 tsp. honey to pan, then gradually drizzle in ⅓ cup water, stirring constantly until butter is melted and sauce is emulsified, about 2 minutes (you may not need all of the water). Scrape lemon mixture over fish and top with chopped parsley.

lemon-garlic-air-fryer-salmon.name: Lemon-garlic Air Fryer Salmon

ingredients.item: Fillets center-cut salmon fillets with skin

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 199°C (200 degrees C).
Combine melted butter and minced garlic in a small bowl.
Rinse salmon fillets and dry with a paper towel. Brush with butter mixture and sprinkle with lemon-pepper seasoning and parsley.
Spray the basket of the air fryer with cooking spray. Place salmon fillets in the basket, skin-side down, and top each with 3 lemon halves.
Cook in the preheated air fryer for 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from the air fryer and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.

lentil-beluette-with-smoked-mackerel-and.name: Lentil Beluette With Smoked Mackerel And Onions
lentil-beluette-with-smoked-mackerel-and.original_name: Bελουτέ φακής με καπνιστό σκουμπρί και κρεμμύδια

ingredients.item: 1 medium dry onion cut into rolls
A little olive oil for garnishing
1 medium dry onion cut into rolls
A little olive oil for garnishing

instructions: In a pot heat the olive oil and add the onion and garlic cloves.
Leave them on medium heat for 6–8–1, until the onion becomes transparent.
Add the carrot, lentils and tomato paste.
Mix and rub the paste in the pot, bake and smell.
Add the bay leaf and water to cover the materials (extend at least 3-4 cm from their surface).
Cover it and let it simmer for about 45 minutes (depending on how hot the legumes are). To the end of the boil add salt and pepper.
Add the vinegar and mix very well. At this stage the soup must have a dense composition.

We ground the soup with the rod or the blender. For a softer texture, we can strain it into a thin sheet. If the velvet is too thick, dilute it with some hot water. If it's thin, let it simmer until it comes to the density we want.
In pan heat the olive oil and place the onions on medium heat to become transparent, stirring regularly.
Add the caper, mix and withdraw.
We sprinkle with parsley.
Divide the velvet into deep dishes and garnish with pieces of smoked mackerel and caramelized onions.
Serve the velvet on dishes and sprinkle with some olive oil.

lentil-bolognese.name: Lentil Bolognese
instructions: Melt butter in a pan over medium heat. To this, add onions and garlicand sauté until the onions become translucent and fragrant.
Toss in chopped peppers and cook for ~2 minutes. Then to this, add tomato paste and vegetable broth.
Simmer on medium heat for ~5 minutes or until tomato paste is combined thoroughly. Add canned lentils and stir well.
Add 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce and season to taste.
Finally, add in spinach and cook down.
Serve alongside pasta of choice.

lentil-meatballs-argiro.name: Lentil Meatballs
instructions: Boil the lentils in a pot with water until soft.
We drop the oatmeal.
When the pot has no more liquids, turn off the fire.
Add salt and pepper, parsley and mint to the mixture.
In a small pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the onion until it wilts, without color.
Put it on the lentils.
Mix well and allow the mixture to cool.
We're making meatballs.
We put them on a platter.

lettuce-cream-pequerecetas.name: Lettuce Cream

ingredients.item: 100 g de lechuga tierna (preferiblemente lechuga romana o trocadero)
1 large avocado or two small, well mature
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
A few drops of fresh lemon juice

instructions: Wash the lettuce well and cover it. Cut her into big pieces.
In a medium frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add lettuce and scrape for 3 minutes, stirring constantly, till slightly soften. Don't let it get golden.
Fold the liquid cream onto the lettuce. Season with salt to taste. Cooking with low heat for about 5 minutes or until lettuce's very tender.
Meanwhile, paddle the avocado, remove the bone and cut it into pieces. Fold it with some drops of lemon juice to avoid its oxidizing.

Take the frying pan from the fire. Add the chopped avocado to the lettuce and cream mixture. With a hand mixer, tighten everything up to get a very fine and homogenous cream. If you prefer more fluids, you can add some water or vegetable stock to achieve the desired consistency.

Test the cream and adjust the salt if necessary. If you wish, you can add some more drops of lemon juice to enhance the taste and maintain the color. To serve you can come with a sour cream and pumpkin pipes.

linguine-with-sausages-recipe-comedera.name: Linguine With Sausages Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 g de salchichas frescas (tipo italiana o criolla)
200 g de tomate triturado (puede ser en conserva)
Queso parmesano o pecorino rallado para servir

instructions: Remove skin from sausage and scrape them with your hands or with a fork. Reserve.
Put the olive oil up in a large frying pan with medium heat. Add very fine minced onion and spray for about 4 minutes, until clear. Add minced garlic and cook another minute.
Incorporates malleaked sausage into frying pan. The fire goes up and cook them up till they're good and they're clear and clear and clear. I should have a toasted color in about 6 to 8 minutes.

If you wear white wine, add it right now. Let his alcohol evaporate for a few minutes. Then add the crushed tomato, a pint of salt and pepper. Cooking with low heat for about 10 minutes, sometimes stirring.
Meanwhile, put plenty of water with salt and cook the Linguini till they are at the dente, following the package time.
Drain the dough by saving some of the cooking water. Add Linguini directly to frying pan with salsa and mix well. If the mixture's too thick, add a few tablespoons of cooking water to loosen up.
Sirve caliente, con una buena cantidad de queso rallado por encima y, si quieres, un poco de perejil fresco para contrastar.

little-gem-wedge-salad-with-tahini-ranch.name: Little Gem Wedge Salad With Tahini Ranch

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, or 2 heads of romaine, quartered lengthwise

ingredients.item: Torn mixed tender herbs (such as basil

instructions: Whisk garlic, yogurt, tahini, lemon juice, and 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl until incorporated and smooth. Season dressing with kosher salt and lots of black pepper (it should look speckled).
Toss lettuce and vinegar in a large bowl; season with kosher salt. Add mixed herbs and give it all another toss.

Spread dressing over plates and top with salad. Sprinkle with seeds, chives, Aleppo-style pepper, and sea salt and drizzle with a little oil.
Read More: The 29 New Essential Recipes from the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen

loaded-tater-tots.name: Loaded Tater Tots
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Spread potato nuggets in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly golden, 20 to 25 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook bacon in the hot skillet, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon on a paper towel-lined plate, then chop coarsely and set aside.

Make sauce: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Cook and stir shallot in hot butter until fragrant. Stir in flour and cook until light golden, about 2 minutes. Whisk in milk and sour cream; stir until smooth and thick, about 5 minutes. Season with black pepper and nutmeg. Stir in 1 cup Cheddar cheese until fully melted.
Transfer potato nuggets to a 9x13-inch baking dish. Sprinkle bacon on top. Pour cheese sauce over nuggets. Cover with remaining 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven just until cheese melts, about 7 minutes. Garnish with green onions and sour cream to serve.

low-carb-cauliflower-and-pulled-pork-she.name: Low-carb Cauliflower And Pulled Pork Shepherd's Pie

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Place cauliflower in a pot and cover with water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and let simmer until tender, 5 to 7 minutes.
While cauliflower is cooking, spray an 8x10-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Layer the bottom of the prepared dish with pulled pork. Layer peas and carrots on top of pork. Spoon cream of mushroom over the top.

Using a potato masher, mash cauliflower as you would potatoes. Add milk slowly as you mash to a creamy, but chunky, texture. Add mashed cauliflower to the top of your casserole. Season with salt and pepper; sprinkle Cheddar cheese over the top. Cover the dish with foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbly and heated through, about 25 minutes.

3-layer-chocolate-delight-teleculinaria.name: 3-layer Chocolate Delight
instructions: Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water. Then pour them out and get them to melt in the microwave without letting it boil. Reserve. Separate the egg whites. Bring to the fire a pot with the milk, the moreena flour and the yolks, always stirring until it thickens.
Cut the chocolates and divide each into three different glasses.
Distribute the mixture of the cream through the 3 bowls with the broken chocolate and stir well so they dissolve me. Also pour the melted gelatin into the bowls and wrap.
Em tigelas separadas bata as natas em chantilly bem firme e as claras em castelo.
Divide them into the bowls with the creams, as you see in the photo.

Move well, pour into a form a layer until solify. Repeat the process in the rest. The penthouse: take the creams with chocolate to the sea bath, after melted, remove and stir well until a cream is left. Remove the form from the cold, soak it in warm water, unshape and serve decorated with chocolate cream and nuggets.
